emails.subject: Analyst / Associate PRC
emails.body: Analyst Associate PRC I understand that due to Greg not responding to your requests, Net Works has been removed from the PRC process for Analyst/Associates this year. Although I understand that reassigning people is out of the question I would like someone present from Net Works to ensure fair representation. I do understand that Analyts and Associates are not represented by their management but we do know that there is usually someone else from their group present in the room to offer guidance should there be any issues. Let me know if you have any problems with this. Thanks Louise

emails.subject: Re: Analyst / Associate PRC
emails.body: Re: Analyst Associate PRC Louise, I was informed today that a PRC rep is either leaving or will not be able to perform the function for some reason. I have asked Shelly Butler to contact you and Robert Jones to see if you want to provide a replacement. I hope this works for you. Thanks Charlene Louise Kitchen@ECT 11/13/2000 03:39 PM
